description_long: This is a stylized, boxy pink pickup truck with a simple, geometric design, featuring a flat hood, rectangular headlights, and a black front bumper. The vehicle has four white wheels with visible hubcaps and a black undercarriage, and the windows are large and dark, providing a clear view of the interior steering wheel and dashboard. The truck sits atop a gray platform with angular edges, which appears to be supported by a brown, faceted base, possibly representing a section of road or ground. The side profile reveals two doors on each side, with minimal detailing and a continuous pink body panel. The rear of the truck is flat, with a subtle tailgate outline and no visible cargo bed, while the front is characterized by its simple grille and headlight arrangement. The overall appearance is clean and minimalistic, with a focus on basic shapes and muted colors.
description: A boxy, pink pickup truck with four white wheels, large windows, and a simple geometric design, sitting on a stylized gray and brown platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat hood, rectangular headlights, black bumper, and windshield with visible steering wheel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the two doors, white wheels, and the full length of the pink body atop the gray platform.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the flat back, subtle tailgate outline, and absence of a visible cargo bed.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing two doors, white wheels, and the pink body on the platform.
